creator: laurent@daverio.net
text:
Hello everybody,

actually, this bug is blocking the build of www/rubygem-rails5 and thence, of www/gitlab-ce, at least the current version, 11.11.0, as the problem didn't with the previous version, 11.10.4.xx

So, I guess this makes the priority of the bug a little higher than "Affects Only Me" now.

Have a great day,

Laurent.
